metadata.title: Nailing a Tight 2v1 With Calm Aim and Smart Positioning in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught these two foes off guard with a slow, careful peek and steady shots. Sometimes patience wins the fight.
What’s your favorite angle to hold in tight situations?
